text:
Once upon a time in an enchantingly forested valley lived a clever fox named Oakley. Oakley loved nothing more than a nice big squirrel nut. Every day, Oakley would chase squirrels around the forest hoping to steal their treasures. One day, his pursuit of a particularly juicy acorn lasted too long.

Oakley forgot the moon had risen. Moonlight cast shadows that grew long. Oakley’s fear wasnvothedicesetails. Pale moonlit owlshootsilvesthemvoices.

At last, a great owl swooped down. Owooooooo!!!

Ow-o-o-o-o.

Ow Owl?That’s no nice big nut!

Just then, two little mice came tumbling down the tree Owwwwww.

Thunk!

Both went Ow.

They scampered away.

Oakley turned gray.

That night the owls went owl owl Ow-o.

At dawn Oakley climbed the oak tree. Up high he saw owl feathers.
